issues.objection: Implication field names a specific change to make; concrete_scenario is anchored in named tools and roles; quotable_line ('Outcomes are produced by structures, not by hero-narratives. The engineer is one node, not the sole author....') survives the elevator-pitch test. The PM-actionable reading: this verse changes a specific behaviour at the work-rhythm level, not a vague aspiration.

notes: Testable engineering predicate (3.11): falsifiability and counter_example together produce a calibrated test the PM can run on real artifacts. PASS.
